# Abderrahim GHAZALI

> Software engineer with 11+ years of experience. Specializes in AI agent development, RAG pipelines, n8n workflow automation, and enterprise Drupal architecture. Open to consulting and contract work.

## Pages

- [Home](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/): Overview of expertise and contact
- [About](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/about/): Background, technical depth, and approach
- [Blog](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/blog/): Articles on AI, automation, Drupal, and software engineering

## Blog Posts

- [Claude Mythos: The AI Model Too Dangerous to Release](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/blog/claude-mythos-the-ai-model-too-dangerous-to-release/): Anthropic built its most capable model ever — then decided not to release it publicly. What Mythos can do, why it matters, and what Project Glasswing means for cybersecurity.
- [We All Use AI to Code Now. Almost Nobody Trusts It.](https://abderrahimghazali.github.io/blog/we-all-use-ai-to-code-now-almost-nobody-trusts-it/): 84% of developers use AI coding tools daily. Only 29% trust the output. What that gap means for the code we ship, the bugs we inherit, and the skills we're quietly losing.

## Expertise

- AI & Automation: autonomous agents, RAG pipelines, semantic search, LangChain, n8n
- Drupal: custom module development, migrations, high-traffic platforms (500K+ monthly users)
- Full-Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, Symfony, Laravel
- DevOps: Docker, CI/CD, cloud deployment
